testsuite.name: SSE Notification Security

testcase.name: Login sets access_token cookie with correct attributes
GET /api/v1/notifications/stream with Bearer token returns SSE stream
GET /api/v1/notifications/stream with access_token cookie returns SSE stream
GET /api/v1/notifications/stream with token in URL query param is rejected

testsuite.system-out:
23:47:43.894 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.uip.backend.notification.NotificationControllerIntegrationTest]: NotificationControllerIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 23:47:43.991 [Test worker] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.uip.backend.UipBackendApplication for test class com.uip.backend.notification.NotificationControllerIntegrationTest
